title: Radical Trainers Structures [Cobblemon]
description: Added some simple structures to the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod.
body:
### This datapack uses a very rough method to spawn trainers, and its compatibility with the latest version of rctmod is unknown, which may cause specific issues.
***
Are you frustrated when you can't find the Leader Trainers to challenge?

This datapack adds matching structures for the 8 Gym Trainers. 

The Trainers generated inside these structures will permanently exist in the world, allowing you to challenge them anytime.


Tips:
- The challenge order is based on the linear progression of the [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod).

- Command Blocks must be enabled for multiplayer.
  

I made this datapack for my server, and now I'm releasing it on Modrinth.

Note: 
- If the datapack is added to a new world, these 8 trainers will not be locatable using trainer cards. I recommend using [Explorer's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass).

- If updating from an old version(0.1), first use a command to remove all Radical Trainer entities, then activate new gym structures in newly generated chunks to spawn them.

- If you want to add badge drops for trainers in structures, you can try [Radical Trainers Badges](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rct-badges).

***
- This is only a half-finished product and currently has many issues. If anyone wants to remake this datapack, feel free to use the structure files.

- If you distribute this datapack in a format other than CurseForge or Modrinth, please include the project URL.
